title: Email rule to send mail to board
excerpt:
Hi, 
I’m trying to create rule in my email to send email to Monday board. I recievd error 
" email was rejected by the reciever" 
Any idea? 
Meytal

posts.author: meytalPeleg (Meytal Peleg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I’m trying to create rule in my email to send email to Monday board. I recievd error
" email was rejected by the reciever"

Any idea?
Meytal

posts.author: Amanda115 (Amanda)
posts.cookedHtml: The Monday.com address may be blocked by their email. Try adding the email address from Monday.com that sends the notification and see if it is accepted.
